category_description: Settings that filter the data returned by BackPop simulations

settings.name: n_threads
settings.description: Sets the number of cores to use in multiprocessing

options.name: integer values
options.description: Number of cores
For example, this sets the number of cores to 1

settings.name: n_eff
settings.description: Minimum effective sample size (see n_eff docs for more information)

options.description: For example, this sets the minimum effective sample size to be 8000

settings.name: n_live
settings.description: Number of live points (see n_live docs for more information)

options.description: For example, this sets the number of live points to be 1000

settings.name: verbose
settings.description: Whether to print verbose output from BackPop and sampler.

options.name: True
options.description: Print verbose output from BackPop and sampler progress.

options.name: False
options.description: Do not print verbose output from Backpop and sampler progress.

settings.name: output folder
settings.description: Path to save output files. If not supplied, output folder created in directory BackPop is run.

options.name: path/to/output_folder
options.description: This specifies the absolute path to save the output files from BackPop.
Default value (not supplying an output path)

settings.name: resume
settings.description: Resumes sampling from previous run (see `resume doc <https://nautilus-sampler.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api_full.html#nautilus.sampler.Sampler>`_

options.name: True
options.description: Resume sampler from previous run.

options.name: False
options.description: Do not resume sampler from previous run. Restart sampler and rewrite files.

settings.name: use_bcm
settings.description: Saves BCM from Backpop run (see `bcm doc <https://cosmic-popsynth.github.io/COSMIC/pages/config_and_output/output_info.html#bcm-user-specified-timestep-table>`_

options.name: True
options.description: Saves BCM from BackPop run.

options.name: False
options.description: Does not save BCM from backpop run.

category_description: Settings that change how the initial binary population is sampled

settings.name: sampling_method
settings.description: Select which models to use to generate an initial sample of binary parameters at Zero Age Main Sequence

options.name: independent
options.description: Initialize binaries with independent parameter distributions for the primary mass, mass ratio, eccentricity, separation, and binary fraction

category_description: Settings that control the convergence of the simulation run with cosmic-pop

settings.name: convergence_params
settings.description: A list of parameters you would like to verify have converged to a single distribution shape when running cosmic-pop from the command line.

options.name: mass_1
options.description: Primary mass

category_description: Settings that control the single star evolution in the simulation

settings.name: stellar_engine
settings.description: Select which stellar evolution engine to use for single star evolution

options.name: sse
options.description: Use SSE for single star evolution which will apply the fitting formulae from Hurley+2000 for the single star evolution

options.name: metisse
options.description: Use METISSE for single star evolution, must supply path_to_tracks and path_to_he_tracks

settings.name: path_to_tracks
settings.description: Path to the METISSE tracks for single star evolution. Must be supplied if stellar_engine is set to metisse

options.name: path/to/tracks
options.description: This specifies the absolute path to the EEP tracks for single star evolution. Leave the string empty if not using METISSE for single star evolution.
Default value (not using METISSE for single star evolution)

settings.name: path_to_he_tracks
settings.description: Path to the METISSE tracks for helium star evolution. Must be supplied if stellar_engine is set to metisse

options.name: path/to/he_tracks
options.description: This specifies the absolute path to the EEP tracks for helium star evolution. Leave the string empty if not using METISSE for single star evolution.
Default value (not using METISSE for single star evolution)

settings.name: z_accuracy_limit
settings.description: Sets the maximum allowed relative difference between the supplied metallicity and the tracks used by METISSE. If cosmic throws an error due to metallicity, increasing this slightly may help. Must be supplied if stellar_engine is set to metisse

options.name: positive values
options.description: Minimum metallicity
Recommended value

settings.name: metisse_verbose
settings.description: Whether to print verbose output from METISSE when using METISSE for single star evolution.

options.name: True
options.description: Print verbose output from METISSE when using METISSE for single star evolution.

options.name: False
options.description: Do not print verbose output from METISSE when using METISSE for single star evolution.
